chapter_title.en: Chapter on Eating and Drinking From Gold and Silver Utensils and Other Etiquettes of Eating

text: اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "يَنْبَغِي لِلشَّيْخِ اَلْكَبِيرِ أَلاَّ يَنَامَ إِلاَّ وَ جَوْفُهُ مُمْتَلِئٌ مِنَ اَلطَّعَامِ فَإِنَّهُ أَهْدَأُ لِنَوْمِهِ وَ أَطْيَبُ لِنَكْهَتِهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4271 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"It is appropriate for an elderly person not to sleep unless his stomach is full of food, for it makes his sleep more restful and his breath more pleasant."
